arts.ttl: Middlesbrough stance on Glen Kamara transfer with Premier League clubs also 'interested'
arts.sum: As such, Kamara has become a player of interest this month as Boro hope to take advantage of his difficult situation in France. Middlesbrough are monitoring Glen Kamara's situation and would have interest in signing the midfielder this month if the finances of the deal were viable.

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town, Southampton and Middlesbrough tussling for same signing
arts.sum: Ipswich Town, Southampton and Middlesbrough are all tussling to sign the same player, reports L’Equipe on Monday morning. Following Leeds United losing the play-off final to Southampton in the summer, Glen Kamara left Elland Road and moved to French football. arts.ttl: Player travels to join West Bromwich Albion permanently – Medical and official announcement pending
arts.sum: West Bromwich Albion have made progress in their pursuit of Standard Liège’s Isaac Price in the winter market, according to multiple claims from Belgium. Monday’s edition of Het Belang van Limburg claims the 21-year-old has played his last fixture for the Belgian club and will travel to England on Monday to join West Brom. arts.ttl: Michael Carrick makes Emmanuel Latte Lath Middlesbrough selection point amid transfer talks
arts.sum: There remains uncertainty over whether Latte Lath will stay at Boro this month after Atlanta United's offer remains open for negotiations. Asked about the Ivorian's future and continued selection after the game, the Boro boss said: “For sure [he’ll keep playing].
